---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Build with `cmake -S . -B build && cmake --build build`
2. Run `...`
3. Observe `...`

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, logs, or test output.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- Compiler: [e.g. GCC 12.3, Clang 16]
- CMake version: [e.g. 3.27]
- CPU: [e.g. Intel i9-13900K, AMD Ryzen 9 7950X]
- SIMD flags: [e.g. OB_ENABLE_AVX2=ON, default/scalar]

## Additional Context

Any other context — screenshots, benchmark output, core dumps, etc.
